tasks.label: Graded assignment — 90% done, submit when finished

memory.summary: I'm almost done with this assignment, and since nothing else is urgent, I should just finish it quickly before the 13:30 deadline.
I missed the deadline because I got distracted, and now I feel terrible about letting my professor down. I really want to avoid this awkwardness and just hope it doesn't ruin our group dynamic.
I'm 99% done, but I keep worrying about the awkwardness of explaining my delay to the professor. Maybe I should just send a quick text instead of waiting until it's actually finished.

desires: Avoid the awkward confrontation of explaining my missed deadline to Prof. Assignment right now; it feels safer to just hope they don't notice.
Finish this assignment immediately so I can stop worrying about being seen as unreliable by my teammates and the professor.
Not feel that crushing guilt about letting everyone down again; I need to get out of this mental loop before I crash completely.

goals.description: Hit submit on the assignment immediately to stop the panic loop and avoid having to explain my unreliability to Professor Assignment or cohort_3.
goals.rationale: My affiliation drive (0.5) makes the risk of looking like a liability unbearable; I'd rather face a bad grade than the social friction of admitting I missed the deadline. My impulsive bias means I can't focus on 'polishing' anymore, I just need to get this over with so I can go eat with friends and reset.

goals.description: Go grab food with cohort_3 right after submission to drown out the guilt and reconnect without talking about work.
goals.rationale: Relationships are my top priority. Once the immediate threat of the deadline passes, nothing else matters as much as hanging out with them to forget the stress. Defer until submission is done because discussing my failure during lunch would be too much emotional labor.

agent.last_reasoning: I need to finish this last bit now. Submitting stops the panic loop and saves me from explaining my unreliability to Professor Assignment or the group later. Once it's done, I can finally go eat with cohort_3 without the guilt hanging over us.

goals.rationale: Relationships are my top value (0.5), but I need to clear the immediate stress first. I'll defer this until right after submission to minimize any friction during the meal.
